LSE-HS9-L4-1400P-HSELA910-FFR-NAV-01 • HS English 9-10 • Citing Textual Evidence for Inferential Analysis

The Songs and the Stories

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to figure out?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the girl is trying to figure out, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what she and the boy say, and articulate the conclusion that follows about which prediction the chapter's evidence supports.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RL.9-10.1  |  HS English 9-10: Citing Textual Evidence for Inferential Analysis
